channel.title: plas on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes
channel.description: Recent content in plas on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes

item.title: Formalising the (Sub-)Structural Aspects of SystemVerilog
item.description: Today, I am very pleased to be traveling all the way to the Programming Languages and Systems Group at the University of Kent in Canterbury. This is not the first time that I have given a talk at Kent. Years a go I spoke at a CryptoForma workshop hosted there. The topic was on linking dependent types, session types, and protocol implementation validation. A topic that I should revisit once my restraints are released, and I am unshackled!
